tone: Close journey replies asking customers to text in their birthday to receive a gift
dos_and_donts: Offer help if the customer replies back to the automated message with number 0
templates: For checkout issues use COI shortcut
If the site doesn't accept the customers payment method use PME shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: The welcome code can be applied to discounted items
For issues with the code GETSTARTED15 use GSE shortcut
The 20% off welcome offer will automatically be added at checkout for their first order

conversation.message_text: Bonobos: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from Bonobos.
Bonobos: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/eEr

Bonobos: Congratulations! We might be biased, but we think you just signed up for the best text alerts in the game 😎 To put money where our mouth is, here's a coupon code for 20% off your first order - hello20_weyseh ! Welcome to Bonobos! 

Get Your 20% Off Now: https://bonobos.attn.tv/aFRaFSvR1AV0 

Terms apply.

Bonobos: 🎵 Don't wanna close this text, we don't wanna fall out of touch, 'cause we'd miss you baby, and we don't want you to miss a thing 🎵 

Be sure to add us to your contacts so you don't miss out on VIP Early Access to sales and other promotions!

Bonobos: Now that we're in your contacts, how about you get in our pants? Not like that. 

Maybe start with The Chino 2.0?: https://bonobos.attn.tv/aBDcMRWOLu2h

Bonobos: Your friend Miles, here! Leave something behind in your cart? It's awfully lonely and would maybe feel more comfortable in your closet.

Reply SIZING for questions related to fit
RETURNS for questions about our return policy
or DISCOUNT for info on available promos. 

Check Out Now: https://bonobos.attn.tv/a-LXBK9igVvj

Shop Before It's Too Late: https://bonobos.attn.tv/axMj_lkMDNUC

Bonobos: Friends look out for each other. And we're friends, right? Right!? Either way, we wanted to let you know your 20% off discount code is about to expire! No worries, just enter hello20_weyseh at checkout now, and you'll be good to go.

Shop Now: https://bonobos.attn.tv/al37pJHYZlh3 

Terms Apply.

The shirt that brings that Summer mojo is also perfect with Fall layers. Let's keep this party going!

Shop New Rivieras: https://bonobos.attn.tv/aIIdqUstHCPC

Bonobos: Your friend Miles here, reaching out to see if you still want that style you've been eyeing. Feel free to text back with any questions!

Take another look: https://bonobos.attn.tv/a2hbNQlVt5Io

In the meantime, you can check out our current promotions here - https://bonobos.attn.tv/aYqyIYP6En_S Also, our sale items are here: https://bonobos.attn.tv/a0V5H_B1eFHI there are some markdowned Chinos that you might like. tone: Let the customer have the last word!
dos_and_donts: Don't reply to messages like "ok", "thanks", etc
promo_and_exclusions: ➜ Cannot be used for new products!
➜ Recommend to cx to take advantage of the Gift With Purchase (found on the Offers page) with new products so they can get a deal
Check their offers page for up-to-date info on codes & offers
If cx asks about a code that isn't on this page, it's likely expired!

ELEMIS: Hi, this is Charlotte. Thanks for popping by Elemis.com! 

Any skincare or product questions I can answer for you?

Shop Now >> https://elemis.attn.tv/sl/j0mXh2Yz .

ELEMIS: Hi! Charlotte here- don't miss out on the items in your ELEMIS cart!

Text back with any questions you may have! 

Complete your purchase now >> https://elemis.attn.tv/sl/oY2VKj5j .
I don't see my 15% discount with my first purchase

ELEMIS: Thanks for reaching out! I'm sorry you are having an issue with the discount. Just to confirm, have you already placed your order? If so, I can check with my team if we can apply that discount to your order. Can I please have your order number and email address?

If you are only looking for your 15% off discount code, here is your code - MBLBHKKE7M3YHH7 

Hope this helps and if you have any questions, I'm just a text away.
How can I apply my TRAVEL discount for this purchase?

ELEMIS: I'm sorry but I don't have any info on that discount, but there could be some requirements included with it, I'm interested to know where you got it. Do you think you can send me a screenshot or tell me more about it? I'll be more than happy to help out!

ELEMIS: Thank you for sending me your screenshot. You'll find the discount box at checkout. If you're on a desktop you'll see it at the right side of your screen when you enter your shipping details. If you're using a phone, you'll need to enter your info and shipping method, and then expand the "Order Details" at the top of the order section in order to reveal the discount code box! Let me know if you can't find it.
There is no discount box for my first purchase

ELEMIS: Thanks for the screenshot! It seems like the discount code has already been applied for you. You can find it under 'add a promotional code' where it indicates that the code "Travel" has been successfully applied!

Let me know if that helps! 

Check out our Clarifying Clay Wash for a purifying cleanse that clears pores, removes excess oil and makeup, and reduces blemishes and blackheads for healthier-looking skin: https://elemis.attn.tv/sl/-dDP7f0d
